ideVersions.vsCodeDevKit: VS Code stable + C# Dev Kit pinned minor

validationCommandOrManualSteps: Open the repository in the documented Dev Container with C# Dev Kit prerequisites satisfied by the developer or release environment; do not install or accept licenses in CI.
revalidationTrigger: C# Dev Kit licensing, Dev Container base image, VS Code extension pin, Remote-SSH, Codespaces, or container auth changes.
